GenAiFunction.description: Simulates the impact of a hypothetical change to a specific deal on overall revenue probability. Use this when the user asks: "What if the Acme deal slips 30 days?", "What happens to my number if TechCo drops to 40%?", "What if I close GlobalBank this week?", or any question involving a named deal and a change. Required inputs: dealSearchTerm (partial deal or account name, e.g. "Acme"), revenueTarget (dollar amount, e.g. 25000000). Optional inputs: newProbabilityPct (new win probability 0-100), closeDateSlipDays (days to push close date forward), timeHorizonDays (defaults to quarter end). Outputs: overallSummary (read directly to user), dealFound (matched deal name), baselineProbabilityPct, scenarioProbabilityPct, probabilityChange (net impact, e.g. "+12.4%").
